## Summary

## Security and behavior impact

- [ ] Secure defaults and least privilege are preserved
- [ ] No client-controlled actor identity or raw secret material is introduced
- [ ] Unsupported mutations remain proposal-only
- [ ] Reported workflow states are backed by observed state

## Verification

- [ ] `make verify`
- [ ] Documentation and OpenAPI updated
- [ ] Tests cover failure, retry, verification, and rollback where relevant
